title: Voice loop UX — surface openwakeword fallback message instead of silencing
what_failed: When openwakeword is unavailable, the except block silently set wake_det=None and fell back to VAD mode with no user-visible feedback. The graceful import trap checker flagged this as a potential silent failure.
fix_applied: Added print("[Voice] openwakeword unavailable — falling back to VAD mode") to the except block in VoiceLoop.run() so the user knows why wake mode was downgraded.
